title: Fix event details display in booking requests

requirements.summary: Display complete event details in OrganizerBookingCard component for each booking request
acceptanceCriteria: Event type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact number are visible in each booking card
Event details are properly formatted and displayed with appropriate icons matching the EventList component pattern
All event information from the associated booking request is accessible to organizers

file_operations.description: Add event details display section showing event type, date, location, number of guests, style, and contact number. Fetch the full event data using the eventId from the booking and display it with appropriate icons (Calendar, MapPin, Users, Sparkles, Phone) matching the EventList component pattern. Maintain the existing booking status display and approve/reject action buttons. Ensure the layout remains responsive and uses the existing card structure.

Verify that the useGetEvent hook is properly exported and available for use in the OrganizerBookingCard component to fetch event details by eventId. Ensure the hook uses the backend actor's getEvent method and includes proper error handling and loading states.

requirements.summary: Display complete event details in GuestBookingList component for each booking
acceptanceCriteria: Event details are visible in guest booking cards alongside organizer name and booking status
Event information includes all fields: type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact number
Layout accommodates the additional event details without breaking responsive design

file_operations.description: Transform the current minimal booking cards to include complete event details. For each booking, fetch the associated event data using the eventId and display event type, date, location, number of guests, style, and contact number alongside the existing organizer name and booking status. Use icons (Calendar, MapPin, Users, Sparkles, Phone) matching the EventList component pattern. Maintain the color-coded status badges and ensure the expanded card layout remains responsive. Consider using a two-column or stacked layout to accommodate both booking metadata and event details.
